findings.project_classification: Monolith web SPA (React 19/Vite 8) over Supabase BaaS; no API layer (RLS + figures_full view + RPCs are the contract)
findings.technology_stack: React 19, react-router-dom 7, Vite 8, vite-plugin-pwa, @supabase/supabase-js 2, CSS Modules; JS/JSX (no TypeScript); Vercel hosting
findings.data_models: 7 tables (figures, categories, prerequisites, videos, video_submissions, takedown_requests, compositions) + figures_full view; sport_type/video_source enums; RLS on all tables; 6 RPCs; switch groups + bilingual fields; built-on tree (figures.built_on_id, acyclic trigger, view exposes parent/children/root) + trick-decomposition columns (spin/inverts/rewind_degs/rotation_type); contexts: jib renamed to feature
findings.api: No REST API; PostgREST + 6 RPC functions + videos Storage bucket + 2 Deno Edge Functions (send-contact, notify-video-submission via Resend)
findings.components: React function components + CSS Modules; 2 contexts (Language, Theme); hooks useAuth/useToast/useT; 8 public pages + 10 admin pages (lazy/code-split)

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part (web: React 19 + Supabase)
Conditional analysis complete; data-models.md, api-contracts.md, component-inventory.md written

Incremental rescan (HEAD 4fb6701): updated data-models, api-contracts, component-inventory, source-tree-analysis, architecture, project-overview, index for built-on tree + trick decomposition + jib->feature context

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To refresh, re-run document-project and choose Re-scan; for a focused area choose Deep-dive.
